name: zutil_zrdr_alloc_node_with_payload
description: zUtil_ZRDR::AllocNodeWithPayload pops or grows a free node and stores the requested payload pointer in it.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zUtil_ZRDR_AllocNodeWithPayload@4 at 0x48ca10 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 17 bytes and the VC object symbol is 32 bytes with 15 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke exercises allocation through push-front and push-back paths and checks stored payload identity.
